name: JD Vance
summary: JD Vance has consistently demonstrated a pattern of behavior that involves spreading false or unsubstantiated claims, often targeting marginalized groups such as immigrants and childless individuals. He has used derogatory language to describe certain groups, including referring to childless people as "sociopathic" and implying that they are less capable of contributing to society. Vance has also shown a willingness to create and spread false narratives, such as the claim that Haitian immigrants are eating pets, even after being contradicted by evidence and fact-checking. Additionally, he has expressed support for policies that would restrict the rights of certain groups, including LGBTQ+ individuals and immigrants, and has advocated for a higher tax rate on childless Americans. Overall, Vance's behavior suggests a disregard for facts and a willingness to use divisive rhetoric to further his own agenda.

entries.fact: JD Vance complained about 'highly educated transplants' in Silicon Valley in a New York Times op-ed.
JD Vance said elite tech crowds wielded 'political-financial power in combination with a certain condescension'.
Our Ohio Renewal, a nonprofit founded by JD Vance, spent more on 'management services' than on programs to fight opioid abuse in its first year.
Our Ohio Renewal's biggest accomplishment, sending psychiatrist Sally Satel to Ohio's Appalachian region, was 'tainted' by ties between Satel, her employer, and Purdue Pharma.
JD Vance voted against raising the debt ceiling, standing against final passage of the Fiscal Responsibility Act of 2023
JD Vance introduced legislation that would have made gender-affirming care for minors a federal crime, with penalties of up to 12 years in prison
JD Vance sponsored the Dismantle DEI Act, which would ban federal diversity, equity, and inclusion programs and funding for agencies, contractors, and organizations receiving federal funds
JD Vance said that Kamala Harris 'can go to hell' because 'she wants to yell at Donald Trump because he showed up' at Arlington National Cemetery
JD Vance said 'Don't do this fake outrage thing' in response to criticism of Trump's visit to Arlington National Cemetery
JD Vance said that a vice president 'doesn't really matter' and that Kamala Harris 'has been a bad vice president'
JD Vance stated that Trump had 'said that explicitly that he would' veto a national abortion ban

JD Vance said in a Fox News interview that the country is run by 'a bunch of childless cat ladies who are miserable at their own lives and the choices that they've made and so they want to make the rest of the country miserable too'
JD Vance said in a podcast interview that being childless 'makes people more sociopathic and ultimately our whole country a little bit less, less mentally stable'
JD Vance suggested in an interview on The Charlie Kirk Show that childless people should be taxed at a higher rate than those with children
JD Vance said that childless teachers were 'trying to brainwash the minds of our children' and criticized American Federation of Teachers President Randi Weingarten

JD Vance alleged that Haitian illegal immigrants were 'draining social services and generally causing chaos all over Springfield, Ohio' and that 'reports now show that people have had their pets abducted and eaten by people who shouldn't be in this country'

JD Vance said that it was 'possible, of course, that all of these rumors will turn out to be false' regarding Haitian immigrants eating pets, but also told his supporters to 'keep the cat memes flowing'

JD Vance promoted conservative activist Christopher Rufo's allegation that African migrants were eating cats in Dayton, Ohio, despite Dayton authorities reporting 'no evidence to even remotely suggest that any group, including our immigrant community, is engaged in eating pets'

JD Vance said that 'a child was murdered by a Haitian migrant who had no right to be here', despite the child's death being an accidental collision between vehicles and the child's father criticizing Vance for using the child's 'death for political gain'

JD Vance defended his claims about Haitian migrants eating cats, saying that he was willing 'to create stories so that the American media actually pays attention ... we're creating a story, meaning we're creating the American media focusing on it'

JD Vance objected to fact-checking during the vice presidential debate, arguing that the rules were that the moderators would not fact-check, and claimed that Haitian immigrants in Springfield, Ohio should not be considered legal because the federal government decided their protected status after they had arrived in the United States
JD Vance cast the tie-breaking vote to confirm Pete Hegseth as Secretary of Defense
JD Vance wrote that 'judges aren't allowed to control the executive's legitimate power' after multiple federal judges issued temporary rulings against various Trump administration actions

JD Vance warned that Greenland faced the 'encroachment of powerful countries' China and Russia 'as they expand their ambitions', while declaring in a 'message to Denmark' that 'you have not done a good job'

JD Vance lamented that the 'globalist economy' had caused the United States to 'borrow money from Chinese peasants to buy the things those Chinese peasants manufacture', and referred to Chinese people as 'peasants'

JD Vance declared 'ideological war' on Europe in a speech at the Munich Security Conference, stating that 'the threat from within' was his biggest concern for European security, rather than Russia or China.

JD Vance told Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy that 'the path to peace and the path to prosperity is maybe engaging in diplomacy' during a meeting at the White House, and later became hostile towards Zelenskyy, accusing him of showing a 'propaganda tour' of Ukraine and not thanking President Trump for trying to end the conflict.
JD Vance opposes abortion, including in cases of rape.
JD Vance said that parents should have more voting power than non-parents, but later backtracked from this suggestion.
JD Vance argued for a higher tax rate on childless Americans in a 2021 interview.
JD Vance expressed a belief that childlessness is linked to sociopathy.
JD Vance bragged about his 'Mamaw's huge stash' of guns in an RNC speech, indicating his opposition to gun control.
JD Vance bashed a teachers union president for not having 'some of her own' children in resurfaced remarks.
JD Vance pushed false accusations of Haitians eating pets.
Ohio police have 'no credible reports' of Haitian immigrants harming pets, contradicting JD Vance's claim.
JD Vance said his false claim about Haitian migrants may not be true but urged followers to keep posting 'cat memes'.
JD Vance shared a social media post about immigrants cooking pets in Dayton, which the city refuted.
Ohio police disputed new allegations that immigrants are eating pets in Dayton.
JD Vance spreads debunked claims about Haitian immigrants eating pets.
JD Vance stuck by his pet-eating claims and said he's willing to 'create stories'.
